highlights.headline: Red-hot Red Sox sweep Rays for 13th straight win

tracking.trackingName: MLB_One-Play (Tampa Bay Rays vs. Boston Red Sox: Game Highlights) 2026/07/19 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Willson Contreras hit a two-run homer, Sonny Gray gave up one run and five hits over six innings, and the Boston Red Sox beat the Tampa Bay Rays 6-1 on Sunday for their 13th win in a row.
headlines.shortLinkText: Red Sox beat the Rays 6-1 behind Contreras and Gray for their 13th straight win

headlines.description: — Austin Riley and Drake Baldwin each hit two home runs and the Atlanta Braves beat the Texas Rangers 8-5 on Sunday to win the three-game series in a matchup of first-place teams.
headlines.shortLinkText: Baldwin has career-high 5 hits, including 2 homers, Riley adds 2 homers as Braves top Rangers 8-5
